description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, cylindrical barrel. The fore-end is squared and vented, suggesting a modern, possibly suppressed or reinforced muzzle. The grip is ergonomically shaped with a textured, grippy surface, likely for improved handling, and is colored in a muted brownish-gray. The receiver area includes a set of colored indicator lights or buttons, adding a high-tech or futuristic element. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, with a smooth contour and visible finger grooves for comfort and control. Overall, the shotgun's construction appears solid and functional, with a focus on durability and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, ergonomic grip, and colored indicator lights, designed for durability and control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, vented fore-end, and two red indicator lights aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, colored indicator lights on the receiver, and the ergonomic grip with visible texture.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the textured grip, rounded trigger guard, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the barrel, grip, and the smooth, contoured trigger guard without visible controls.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with smooth contour and visible finger grooves
